phrases.en: Kate stands in front of the bathroom sink.
phrases.zh: 凯特站在卫生间的洗手池前。

phrases.en: She waits until the water feels warm.
She ties her hair back so it stays dry.
phrases.zh: 她把头发扎到后面，让它保持干燥。

phrases.en: She cups her hands and splashes water on her face.
phrases.zh: 她把手掌弯成杯状，往脸上撩水。

phrases.en: She squeezes a little cleanser onto her fingertips.
phrases.zh: 她挤一点洁面乳到指尖上。

phrases.en: She gently works the cleanser into her skin.
phrases.zh: 她轻轻地把洁面乳揉进皮肤里。

phrases.en: She rubs it in small circles around her cheeks and nose.
phrases.zh: 她在脸颊和鼻子周围打小圈揉搓。

phrases.en: She rinses the soap off with clean water.
She grabs a soft towel from the rack.
phrases.zh: 她从架子上拿起一条柔软的毛巾。

phrases.en: She gently pats her face dry.
Now her face feels fresh and clean.
phrases.zh: 现在她的脸感觉清爽又干净。
